text.title: Launch Comms Kit Template Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure for applying Launch Comms Kit Template. Each step lists input, action, and output. Pause and surface the artefact when output is produced.

step.name: freeze-positioning
step.action: Validate ≤140 chars, anchored to ≥1 proof point.

step.name: draft-per-channel
step.action: Generate channel-specific shape (headline, body, CTA) per channel.

step.name: cross-check-consistency
step.action: Compute positioning_sentence overlap per channel piece; fail if <80%.

step.name: schedule-timeline
step.action: Lock per-channel publish_at + book retro_at calendar invite.

decision-gate.p: After step 4, the artefact MUST satisfy the output contract in content/02-output-contract.xml before downstream consumers read it.
